message:
Update PromptCard tests to match component redesign

Sync test assertions with the visual changes made to PromptCard:

Button label changes:
- "Add" button renamed to "Save" for clearer basket semantics
- Update all basket-related test assertions to use /save/i regex

Tag display changes:
- Tags now limited to 3 visible (was 4), update test expectation
- Tags no longer prefixed with # symbol
- Hidden count shows "+2" instead of "+1" for 5 total tags

Token count display:
- Remove tilde prefix from token count ("250 tokens" not "~250 tokens")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
